title: Error: Internal Error: adder_sub_tb1.txt:64:9: ../V3Scope.cpp:72: Can't locate varref scope $monitor
body:
[addsub_if.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/18895456/addsub_if.txt)
[adder_sub_8bit.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/18895458/adder_sub_8bit.txt)
[adder_sub_tb1.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/18895457/adder_sub_tb1.txt)

Note: I renamed the files to '.txt' instead of '.v' or '.sv' as the bug report form didn't allow uploading files with these extensions!


Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contaned so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs

Yes, please see attached files.

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

`verilator --cc --exe --main --timing -Mdir adder_sub_tb1-sim --prefix adder_sub_tb1 -o adder_sub_tb1 --timescale 1ns/1ps adder_sub_8bit.txt addsub_if.txt adder_sub_tb1.txt`

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

`macOS: Verilator 5.032 2025-01-01 rev UNKNOWN.REV`
`Ubuntu Verilator 5.032 2025-01-01 rev v5.032`

What OS and distribution are you using?
Tested on `macOS Sequoia 15.3.1` and `Ubuntu 24.04.1 LTS`. Both are giving the same error:

```
%Error: Internal Error: adder_sub_tb1.txt:64:9: ../V3Scope.cpp:72: Can't locate varref scope
   64 |         $monitor("Time=%0t rst_n=%b a=%h b=%h doAdd0=%b result=%h overflow=%b",
      |         ^~~~~~~~
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```
code_blocks:
%Error: Internal Error: adder_sub_tb1.txt:64:9: ../V3Scope.cpp:72: Can't locate varref scope
   64 |         $monitor("Time=%0t rst_n=%b a=%h b=%h doAdd0=%b result=%h overflow=%b",
      |         ^~~~~~~~
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
